description: Benchling is a life sciences R&D platform for managing scientific data such as sequences, registry entities, assay results, inventory, notebook entries, and workflows. It also offers a data warehouse for analytics and event-driven integration features for enterprise tenants.
summary: Benchling exposes a tenant-scoped REST API plus an official Python SDK abstraction over that API; docs also describe a separate PostgreSQL-backed Warehouse connection with its own credentials.
